experiment_scope: Deterministic synthetic budget probes for quality-resource trends; not a replacement for results/fair_comparison.
limitations: Only three deterministic synthetic probes are used.
Hash embedding is not MiniLM or another semantic production encoder.
The token metric is a deterministic proxy, not a real tokenizer.
Template-answer keyword coverage is not LLM answer quality.
RSS includes the full Python process and is affected by allocator and OS behavior.
Latency is specific to the local machine and run conditions.
This sweep does not compare the overall quality of the four StateBudgetMem methods.
Formal method conclusions remain in results/fair_comparison.

metric_definitions.answer_accuracy: Deterministic template-answer keyword coverage proxy; not LLM answer quality.
metric_definitions.estimated_memory_storage_bytes: Estimated UTF-8 bytes of memory content and selected metadata; not persisted disk usage.
metric_definitions.memory_retrieval_accuracy: Keyword coverage of relevant probe terms in budget-selected memories.
metric_definitions.result_artifact_bytes: Sum of generated compact CSV, JSON, and PNG artifact file sizes.
metric_definitions.retrieval_latency_ms: Wall-clock dense retrieval time measured with perf_counter_ns; excludes token-budget selection.
metric_definitions.rss: Resident set size of the whole Python process sampled with psutil; includes runtime, NumPy, FAISS, and loaded dependencies.
metric_definitions.stale_retrieval_rate: Fraction of selected memories matching probe-specific stale keywords.
metric_definitions.token_proxy: ASCII alphanumeric runs count as one proxy unit; each non-ASCII non-whitespace character counts as one proxy unit. This is not a real tokenizer.

token_proxy_warning: token_proxy is a deterministic local proxy, not a real tokenizer token count.
